chunks.text: On Sunday morning, my family was looking forward to a walk through the town.
We left home at seven o'clock.
The square in the center of town lies quietly between two big streets.
Around the square, many colorful flowers were in bloom.
We walked across a small stone bridge to our favorite bakery.
The shop stood on the top of a hill.
Without the map, we would have been lost.
My mother opened a big paper map and guided us.
On our way home, we walked through the park and slowly around the pond.
In the pond, the fish swam gently.
Beside the pond, an old bench stood under a tall tree.
During our walk, we talked about many things — about today, about tomorrow
and about our dreams for the future.
